name.ja: <ruby>蒼<rt>そう</rt></ruby><ruby>救<rt>きゅう</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt>おう</rt></ruby><ruby>姫<rt>ひめ</rt></ruby> リムリス

summoning_condition.en: You can Tribute Summon this card in Attack Position by Tributing 1 WATER Attribute Warrior Type monster or 1 Fairy Type monster.

requirement.en: During the turn you Normal Summoned this card.

effect.en: Add up to 2 "Soleil the Skysavior Angel", "Lua the Skysavior Angel", and/or "Fusion" from your Graveyard to your hand. Then, you can send 1 monster from your field to the Graveyard.
